text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is exhausted, so I decide to
bring her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Thanks so much for worrying about me! I
can really tell that you care! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get some proper rest! Maybe you'll
even show up in my dreams. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where am I? And why is there an airplane
here?

text_block_list.name: Flight Instructor
text_block_list.text:
Your mission, Airman Mayano, is to land on the
beach in formation with your trainer, and ring
that bell!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I get to fly with Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ☆ A couple's flight with Trainer... There's
no way I'm gonna mess this up!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Woo! ☆ Great flying, Trainer! But I'm not gonna
just sit here and let you outdo me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Touchdown! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay! On the count of three! ♪ One, two... three!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ring, ding, dong!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm still in the infirmary. I must've been
dreaming...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That bell sounded kinda like...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I bet that dream was a good omen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mood improved by her dream, Mayano Top
Gun leaves the infirmary with a skip in her step.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? I'm losing altitude! Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The engines! Mayday!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Wait, I was just dreaming?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Even my dreams are frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to shake off her dream, Mayano Top Gun
is unable to get proper rest...
